segments.purpose: Stop the scroll by showing the cost or pain point immediately.
segments.caption: Stop paying $20+ for nail trims.
segments.editing_note: Use the strongest pain-point line from the product brief as opening text. Pair with the clearest product or demo visual available. Missing role: product_brief_or_script.

segments.purpose: Make the viewer recognize the grooming pain or cost problem.
segments.caption: Pet nail trims are stressful and expensive.
segments.editing_note: Use source video moments that show pet handling, grooming setup, or the need for safer trimming. Missing role: demo_or_source_clip.

segments.purpose: Show the product mechanism or use case clearly.
segments.caption: LED light helps you see the quick before cutting.
segments.editing_note: Prioritize close-up product operation. If using the 720x960 source clip, crop or rebuild to 9:16 before final timeline work. Missing role: demo_or_source_clip.

segments.purpose: Give the viewer confidence that the product is safer, quieter, or easier.
segments.caption: Safer, easier, cheaper at home.
segments.editing_note: Use product image as a stable proof visual if no dedicated proof clip exists. Keep text short and benefit-led. Missing role: product_reference_image.

segments.purpose: Tell the viewer what to do next.
segments.caption: Grab yours below.
segments.editing_note: End with TikTok Shop-oriented CTA text. Do not publish automatically; this is only strategy output. Missing role: product_brief_or_script.

notes: Timeline is for planning and manual CapCut recreation only.
No video editing, rendering, ffmpeg, or external API calls are performed in P0_004.
